name: qa-executor
description: Portable QA execution plugin with a qa-executor skill for running or guiding approved QA test cases, capturing evidence, producing execution_result JSON, syncing managed Plane.so and Notion execution output, auto-preparing Notion reports from discovered links, and handing structured results to QA reporter and automation agents.

interface.shortDescription: Execute QA cases and capture evidence.
interface.longDescription: QA Executor provides a portable skill for normalizing planner-driven, manual, Plane.so, or Notion test cases, resolving run policy scope, executing API, UI, DB, hybrid, or manual-instruction checks, capturing redacted evidence, producing execution_result JSON, discovering Notion links from Plane, auto-preparing Notion execution reports when a high-confidence Notion test source is found, managing Plane and Notion sync with bridge cross-links, preflight policy, and idempotency, managing OK/NOK execution review, and generating handoffs for qa-reporter and qa-automation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-executor to run or guide approved QA test cases, optionally sync managed Plane and Notion output with bridge links, and produce an execution result package.
